LAW AND MOTION 301, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT THE GAP INCORPORATED'S DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT OF PLAINTIFF/CROSS-DEFENDANT IS SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND, IF PLAINTIFF IS PREPARED TO ALLEGE THE SPECIFICS OF A STATEMENT BY DEFENDANT THAT THE HISTORICAL INFORMATION IN EXHIBIT O REMAINED AN ACCURATE DEPICTION OF LATER VOLUMES, IT MAY HAVE ONE LAST OPPORTUNITY TO DO SO WITHIN 10 DAYS.
